narrative:
Greenhills B (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,040 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Republican lean of 2.2 percentage points.
